display_text: Keen-eyed. Enhancement: Provides +125 / +135 cast range and +1 / +1.5 mana regeneration at the cost of reducing maximum mana by 10%. This is a purely stat-modifying effect with no active ability or cooldown, designed to enhance the range and mana sustain of spellcasting heroes. Stats: Cast Range: +125/135, Mana Regen: +1/1.5, Max Mana Reduction: 10%.
search_text: keen eyed, enhancement, cast range increase, mana regeneration, mana reduction, neutral item, stat modifier, range boost, mana boost, utility item, Keen-eyed
